
### information flow  {.smaller}


* so far: static analysis concerned with control flow
* often, we're really worried about how <i>data</i> moves 
<hr class="vspace" />
* many applications: 

   * does an array index depend on user input?
   * does an SQL query depend on user input?
   * does data sent over network depend on phone number?

* … 
<hr class="vspace" />
* can do this <i>statically</i> (potential dependencies) <br> or <i>dynamically</i> (actual dependencies as program runs)
